body.title: Wire InferenceDevice.dispatch() to OR budget gate
body.result: budget_gate.py: check_balance pre-call + record_spend post-call in dispatch(); fail-open on network error; no TheIgors imports
body.description:
The ADC inference device ('devices/inference/device.py') explicitly has no budget management. Both the Librarian and any future ADC device routing through it make OR calls that are invisible to the budget system Igor tracks in infra.spend/infra.balance_history. Add a lightweight budget gate so every ADC OR call checks balance pre-call and records spend post-call.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/device.py, devices/inference/budget_gate.py (new)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, no-TheIgors-imports (ADC must be portable). Use IGOR_HOME_DB_URL env var for infra.spend writes; graceful no-op if env var absent or DB unreachable.
**Scope boundary:** inference device dispatch path only. No changes to TheIgors budget.py. The new budget_gate.py is ADC-internal — direct OR API call for balance (cached in-process, 1h TTL), psycopg2 write to infra.spend with note='caller=adc_inference'. Attribution goes in the 'note' field of the existing schema (no migration needed).
**Test plan:** Add tests to tests/test_inference_via_bus.py or new tests/test_inference_budget_gate.py: (1) dispatch with mocked OR response records spend to infra.spend, (2) dispatch proceeds when balance_gate returns ok, (3) balance_gate degrades gracefully when IGOR_HOME_DB_URL absent.
